title: Understanding Management and Leadership
description:
Organizations don’t appoint managers simply as a career milestone. They place managers in roles that directly influence team performance, workplace culture, and business success. If you’re aspiring to become a manager, recently stepped into a leadership role, or want to strengthen your people management skills, this course is for you.  

In this course, you will develop practical management skills and leadership skills to succeed in modern workplaces. You will understand how organizations evaluate the manager role, and how managerial authority and influence are earned through ethical leadership, accountability, and strong decision making. 

You will build the ability to motivate teams, improve team performance, and practice effective people management through real-world scenarios and reflective activities. You will also learn how to deliver impactful coaching and feedback, create psychological safety, and align team efforts with organizational goals through clear vision setting and communication skills. 

By the end of this course, you will be able to apply performance management, strengthen workplace leadership, and confidently handle the responsibilities and challenges that come with managing people and driving business success.
